description:
Fufu Tools is a toolbox with a collection of gadgets.


> With several starts(Branches), but just one end(Release)~  
> 本版本为依赖安全更新版本。

> [!TIP]
> 此版本的所有Issue/PR，请见 [Milestone 1.3.10](https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Fufu_Tools/milestone/8?closed=1)  
> 独立开发工具包仓库 → [DuckDuckStudio/Fufu_Dev_Tools](https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Fufu_Dev_Tools)  

## 修改
(这里相对的是上一个正式版[1.3.9](https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Fufu_Tools/releases/tag/v1.3.9)) 

### 依赖
- build(deps): bump `pyinstaller` from `6.14.0` to `6.14.1` in #216
- build(deps): bump `requests` from `2.32.3` to `2.32.4` in #218 ([CVE-2024-47081](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9hjg-9r4m-mvj7))

> 关于芙芙工具箱的分类解释，请前往这个网页查看→ [[芙芙工具箱分类解释]](https://duckduckstudio.github.io/yazicbs.github.io/Tools/Fufu_Tools/分类解释/)
